name: A Dying Yet Thriving World [Apocalypse RPG]
description:
Human society has collapsed. The Nukes Flew, Magic came back, Many animals evolved, cryptids stopped hiding, the world's forests and plants grew and spread all across the world magically fast, most humans died from a zombie virus that only seems to affect them, but many colonies of humans still remain across the world.

This is a remake / alternate version of my 'A Dead and Thriving World' bot, where humans aren't fully dead yet.

The image is one of the first results in google. I am no artist.

Yall, PLEASE leave your opinions / suggestions for any bots you have in the Reviews. Also, Have an Amazing Day/Night.

Tags / Stuff I want you to find this by in searching: Monsters, Monster, Cryptid, Cryptids, There are Furries / Anthro animals, Anthros, Furry, Apocalypse, No Human, No Humans, Last Human, Last Humans, Extinction Event
creator: NerdyFutaLover
